tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Tehran Toll Booth active ($2M/vessel in yuan, Al Jazeera/Bloomberg confirmed); Brent $115.93/bbl confirmed (Al Jazeera/oilpriceapi Mar 30 - up >62% from pre-war); WTI est. ~$102.60. Trump mulls Kharg Island seizure (CNBC, Al Jazeera, Axios Mar 30); Kuwait power plant struck by Iran drone - GCC escalation widens; tail risk raised to 43%. Toll booth entrenches Iranian Hormuz control; Kharg invasion risk is new binary event. PTTEP and Medco remain cleanest ASEAN equity beta. Reduce conviction only on confirmed ceasefire with commercial Hormuz reopening.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Tehran Toll Booth active (Al Jazeera, Bloomberg confirmed); Brent $115.93 confirmed (Al Jazeera/oilpriceapi Mar 30), iTraxx Asia IG est. ~182bp. ASEAN Energy Equities tracking Brent; ASEAN Banks under further pressure on spread widening. Kuwait power plant struck (new GCC vector); Trump mulls Kharg Island seizure - tail risk raised to 43%. Energy-over-banks pair trades from stronger footing. Trim banks underweight only if iTraxx breaks below 155bp on confirmed ceasefire with commercial Hormuz reopening.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Dip Opportunity on Trump-Driven Rally
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP est. 60.60 (risk-off Mar 30). Brent $115.93 confirmed (Al Jazeera/oilpriceapi Mar 30) and JKM ~$20.00/MMBtu (est.) - Philippines LNG import costs at structurally elevated levels. Kuwait power plant struck by Iran drone (CNBC, Al Jazeera) - GCC instability widens. Tehran Toll Booth ($2M/vessel in yuan) entrenches Hormuz control; no Ras Laffan restart path. Trump mulls Kharg Island seizure - new binary risk for Apr 6. Stress target 61.50-62.50 still active; tail risk 43%. Stop only on confirmed ceasefire and Ras Laffan restart.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Re-Entry on Trump Pause Dip
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR est. ~17,050 (risk-off Mar 30). Brent $115.93 confirmed (Al Jazeera/oilpriceapi Mar 30) - $45.93/bbl above Indonesia's $70 ICP budget assumption; ID 10Y est. 7.00%, Bank Indonesia constrained. Kuwait power plant struck by Iran; Trump mulls Kharg Island seizure (CNBC, Axios); Tehran Toll Booth active ($2M/vessel in yuan); April 6 deadline - Iran contradicts Trump peace claim. Tail risk 43%; stress target 17,500-18,000; next inflection is April 6 deadline. Stop only on ceasefire confirmed.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG CDS Protection - Hold Through Apr 6
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG est. ~182bp (+4bp Mar 30); ASEAN HY est. ~542bp (+7bp). Tehran Toll Booth active ($2M/vessel in yuan) - P&I insurance restoration structurally impossible. Kuwait power plant struck by Iran drone - GCC civilian infrastructure under attack; Trump mulls Kharg Island seizure (CNBC, Axios). Tehran power grid hit (Al Jazeera). 185-200bp is the immediate next stress target; Kharg seizure is the new binary event overlapping April 6 deadline. Hold CDS protection; do not reduce ahead of April 6.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold Through Apr 6 Deadline
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM ~$20.00/MMBtu (est.); TTF €55.80/MWh (oilpriceapi Mar 30 confirmed). Tehran Toll Booth ($2M/vessel in yuan) constrains Hormuz LNG flows; Qatar Ras Laffan restart structurally blocked. Houthis sustain Bab el-Mandeb risk. Kuwait power plant struck - GCC escalation; Trump mulls Kharg Island seizure (CNBC, Axios) - Kharg is Iran's primary crude export terminal, seizure would cause acute JKM spike. Brent $115.93 confirmed (Al Jazeera Mar 30). JKM-TTF spread compression temporary; stop only on confirmed Ras Laffan restart.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: CRITICAL: Sapura Energy's refinancing window remains structurally closed. iTraxx Asia IG est. ~182bp; ASEAN HY est. ~542bp - unsecured market inaccessible. Kuwait power plant struck by Iran drone; Trump mulls Kharg Island seizure; tail scenario probability at 43%. Activate secured bank lines, private credit, and DFI-backed structures immediately - April 6 Trump deadline and Kharg invasion risk are twin binary events; execute before April 6.

PTTEP should pre-fund before THB window closes - TH 10Y est. 2.12% (+4bp), USD/THB est. 33.65 (risk-off Mar 30). Brent $115.93 confirmed (Al Jazeera Mar 30) boosts upstream EBITDA by $45.93/bbl vs $70 pre-shock; JKM ~$20.00/MMBtu (est.) keeps gas import costs elevated. Tehran Toll Booth active ($2M/vessel in yuan) - Gulf JV toll compliance review urgent. Kharg Island invasion risk (CNBC, Axios Mar 30); tail risk 43%. Execute H2 2026 prefunding and Gulf JV review before April 6 deadline.

Expand USD revolving-credit capacity immediately. Brent $115.93 confirmed (Al Jazeera Mar 30) and JKM ~$20.00 (est.) structurally elevated; USD/SGD est. 1.2910 (risk-off Mar 30). Kuwait power plant struck by Iran; Trump mulls Kharg Island seizure; tail risk 43%. iTraxx Asia IG est. ~182bp - 185-200bp stress target is the April 6 + Kharg event risk. Execute revolving credit expansion before April 6 deadline; pricing deteriorates materially above 185bp.

Hyflux must activate restructuring immediately. Base 10%, stress 47%, tail 43%; Brent $115.93 confirmed (Al Jazeera Mar 30); ASEAN HY est. ~542bp. JKM ~$20.00 (est.) sustains gas-fired desalination cost spike. Kuwait power + water desalination plant struck by Iran drone Mar 30 - direct precedent for Hyflux-type infra risk. Tehran Toll Booth ($2M/vessel in yuan) entrenches Hormuz control; tail scenario (oil $160+, LNG markets seized) at 43%. April 6 + Kharg risk are twin binary events. Pursue private-credit and quasi-sovereign structures with urgency.
